scripts.test: pnpm run pretest && pnpm --filter @ak-system/api run test
scripts.pretest: mkdir -p packages/api/test-data && (cd packages/database && DATABASE_PATH=../api/test-data/ak_system.sqlite pnpm run push)
scripts.db:push: cd apps/web && mkdir -p data && DATABASE_PATH=$PWD/data/ak_system.sqlite pnpm --filter @ak-system/database run push
scripts.e2e: pnpm run pretest:e2e && pnpm --filter @ak-system/web run test:e2e
scripts.pretest:e2e: mkdir -p apps/web/data && (cd packages/database && DATABASE_PATH=../../apps/web/data/e2e.sqlite pnpm run push)
